D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

White's Illusion

toggle the reveal and watch two identical greys, one on black bars and one on white, finally match

Lightness here follows the bars a grey patch lies along, not the bars beside it. Grey collinear with black stripes assimilates lighter; grey collinear with white stripes assimilates darker.

The two grey bars are the identical grey. One rides a black stripe, the other a white stripe, and they look clearly different. Toggle the reveal to set both on neutral and confirm they match.
